transcript: It's a tale of two halves when these two met in Chestnut Hill in February Louisville led by eight in intermission but Boston College one going away Huntley Hatfield beautiful defense by Zachary anticipating the pass Mason Mattson nothing but nine on and Boston College takes the lead. Double comes, cross lane pass turned over. Huntley Hatfield, a little bit more patient, accept the double, and then take your time to get that out. Claude Del Harris Jr. in rhythm. James going to work on Mattson. Mason wins the battle. Madsen feeds strong inside. Al Thompson to get in transition. You have to honor the fact that he's a three-point shooter. Gets the ball wide open to strong. And you see him doing it on both sides of the ball. And Louisville's got to find some offense. I thought at the beginning of the game, they were doing a better job of being able to touch the paint. Good pass over to touch the paint. Good pass over to Trey White. McLaughlin, nice backdoor pass, a round it in for Donald and Junior. Good read by McLaughlin, realizing the hand had gotten past this man and put it right where he needed it All the way baseline Caleb Glenn throws it down Eight point lead for the Eagles Johnson again a blur on the baseline and one it's a penetration. You see he's got This man there and then he basically absorbs that contact finishes strong boston college has not had any type of consistent scoring because you've seen quinn post in and out of the lineup now with madsen on the bench we see great pickpocket by johnson the reason for the momentum gene brian is number four in red turning them over but the the thing is is that it's been up and down you know Boston College been able to maintain but I think that Zachary tough shot great hustle on the glass by Armani mighty are you kidding me and he basically bullied two of the guys from Louisville finishes strong at the rim but he has fond memories of watching his home country in the World Cup in 2010. That's what Quentin was doing in 2010 Jaden Zachary a nice up-and-under move for two Prince Aligbe with his bright pink sneakers Trying to back down Payne. Aligbe scores. There's an opening here for Louisville these last two minutes to get back in this thing Huntley Hatfield able to float it in Louisville's had consecutive stops and they have been able to score two consecutive possessions another deflection from Huntley Hatfield he's grabbing his left knee loose ball taken by Clark Yovanovitch ahead of the pack. Lays it in. And then what happened? Watch this last play. Again, active hands. You get the ball out. And then you get into early offense. Yovanovitch has done a good job since he's come into the game. Finishes right at the rim. Here at the YUM Center. Harris versus Yovanovitch. Sidestep three. Got it. Waddell Harris Jr. at the buzzer! Sidestepping three at the buzzer. Boston College to have the double. Boston College again, how much you tried to establish. You see Huffield come up with the steal. Brandon Huntley-Hack behind he calmly lays it in I would love to see Boston College building get Quinn pulse going because again every time he's touched it you see right there putting a ball on the floor Greek that began in Chestnut Hill on February 13th tough shot pretty good defense for Madsen on white Madsen did a What a good job closing wide off he's a good pass and a finish Zachary the pass and McLaughlin the blood unable to finish James Zachary with his fourth assist of the game Devin McLaughlin with his loudest two of the night Zachary posts up james kicks it mclaughlin, sticks it Jaden Zachary's done a good job of being able to distribute and get everyone involved Post trying to get it back to Zachary, and it's a turnover Clark circles the wagons, elbow jumper, good Two buckets by Scott Clark. Love the fact the defense is starting to play back to Louisville. Another bad pass from the Eagles. Clark to James to Clark for two. Gets only half field. A wide open three. Zachary Nifty crossed over. Better block from behind. But Post was right there for the stuff post all of a sudden eight points for this four rebounds Huntley Hatfield sets up Williams for three post throws it to a guy wearing red it's Tyler Johnson johnson james to huntley hatfield seventh rebound for devin mclaughlin harris sets his feet and swishes the rainbow three johnson lost his dribble gets it to clark with eight clark going baseline nice pass huntley Hatfield lays it in how about that he's six for six from the line in his career he's tied for the most highest free throw percentage in NCAA history but the victory belongs to Boston College
